faq.question: Do I need any experience to start?
faq.answer: No. This system is built for complete beginners. We assume you know nothing about affiliate marketing or AI tools. Everything is explained step by step.

faq.question: Do I need to spend money on ads or tools?
faq.answer: No. The entire system uses free AI tools and free traffic platforms. You don't need a budget to get your first sale.

faq.question: How fast can I start seeing results?
faq.answer: Most beginners who follow the system get their first clicks within 3-5 days. First sales typically happen within 7-14 days, depending on consistency.

faq.question: Do I need a website?
faq.answer: No. You can start without a website. We show you how to use free platforms to post your content and share your affiliate links.

faq.question: What if I don't know how to write?
faq.answer: That's exactly why we use AI. You'll get copy-paste prompts that create content for you. You don't need to be a writer.

faq.question: Will this work in my country?
faq.answer: Yes. The system works worldwide. As long as you can access free platforms like Medium, Pinterest, or Reddit, you can use this system.

faq.question: What's the refund policy?
faq.answer: 30-day money-back guarantee. No questions asked. If you're not satisfied, email us and we'll refund you immediately.

faq.question: Is this a get-rich-quick scheme?
faq.answer: No. This is a simple system that requires consistent action. Your results depend on how well you follow the steps and how much content you create.

faq.question: What affiliate programs do you recommend?
faq.answer: We recommend beginner-friendly programs like ClickBank, Digistore24, and Amazon Associates. You'll get specific recommendations inside the course.

faq.question: Can I use this alongside my job?
faq.answer: Yes. The system is designed for people with limited time. You can complete the daily tasks in 30-60 minutes per day.
